results.title: Biogen AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Biogen Inc. has positioned itself as a leader in applying artificial intelligence to address complex neurological diseases, building on its legacy as one of the world's first biotechnology companies founded in 1978 by Nobel Prize winners [1]. The company has embraced AI across multiple areas of its operations, from drug discovery and clinical trial optimization to digital health solutions and operational efficiency [2]. Under CEO Chris Viehbacher's leadership, Biogen has undergone a strategic transformation, balancing internal R&D capabilities with external AI partnerships to accelerate breakthrough therapies in neurology, immunology, and rare diseases [3].
...

...
AI strategy?
...
Biogen's AI strategy focuses on accelerating drug discovery for neurological diseases through partnerships with AI companies, internal digital health solutions, and large-scale data analysis to identify novel therapeutic targets and optimize clinical trials.
...
How is Biogen using AI in drug discovery?
...
Biogen uses AI for target identification through genetic and proteomic data analysis, molecular design with generative AI, drug-protein interaction prediction, and RNA splicing analysis to discover new treatments for CNS diseases.
...
Major AI partnerships include TheraPanacea for medical imaging AI, Envisagenics for RNA splicing analysis, Mila Quebec AI Institute for advanced research, and City Therapeutics for RNAi technology development.
...
Biogen focuses AI efforts on neurological diseases including Alzheimer's disease, multiple sclerosis, ALS, spinal muscular atrophy, and rare diseases, leveraging AI to accelerate breakthrough therapy development.

results.title: Research Scientist AI/ML Foundational Models job with Takeda | 3058048
highlights:
Research Scientist AI/ML Foundational Models job with Takeda | 3058048
...
# Research Scientist AI/ML Foundational Models
...
Employer Takeda Location Boston, Massachusetts Start date
...
, 2026
...
The AI/ML organization at Takeda is building a team to transform how medicines are discovered. Our goal is to apply AI and machine learning across the entire drug discovery process, not just isolated steps, but as an integrated approach from target identification through development. This requires discernment: knowing which models and methods fit each problem, and the creativity to adapt when they don't. We work with foundational models, generative approaches, and autonomous systems, but the tools only matter when paired with people who understand the science deeply enough to use them well. Our team brings together computational scientists, biologists, engineers, and drug hunters. If you want to contribute your expertise to hard problems alongside colleagues with different perspectives and help shape how AI delivers real impact in drug discovery, we'd like to hear from you.
...
We are seeking Scientists to develop and deploy foundational AI models that will transform drug discovery across Takeda. As part of the AI/ML Foundation team, you will build large-scale models including large language models (LLMs), diffusion models, and multimodal architectures that integrate diverse data types—omics, biomedical imaging, protein 3D structures, and molecular representations. This role requires deep expertise in modern deep learning architectures combined with foundational knowledge of biology, chemistry, and disease biology to ensure models are scientifically grounded and impactful. You will train models from scratch, fine-tune pre-trained models for Takeda-specific applications, and deploy foundation model capabilities that accelerate discovery across all therapeutic platforms.
...
- Develop and train foundational AI models (LLMs, diffusion models, flow-matching architectures) for drug discovery applications, with capability to pre-train on large-scale scientific corpora and molecular datasets.
...
- Fine-tune and adapt pre-trained foundation models (protein language models, chemical LLMs, vision transformers) for Takeda-specific applications in target identification, disease modeling, and molecular design and discovery.
...
- Build multimodal foundation models integrating diverse data types including omics (genomics, transcriptomics, proteomics), biomedical imaging, protein 3D structures, and molecular representations.

results.title: LLM Engineer job with VIB | 12860950
highlights:
LLM Engineer job with VIB | 12860950
...
# LLM Engineer
...
VIB is a leading life sciences research institute in Flanders, Belgium, with a strong focus on translating basic scientific discoveries into benefits for society. With the launch of VIB.AI, we are expanding our mission to harness the power of artificial intelligence for life sciences research, innovation, and impact.
...
The VIB Center for Neuroscience Leuven (CNL) investigates the mechanisms of brain function and neurological disease across the scales of biology, spanning neurodegeneration, neurodevelopment, synaptic biology, and computational neuroscience. AI and large language models have transformative potential across these research areas.
...
We are now looking for an LLM Engineer in a shared position between VIB.AI's Machine Learning Expertise Unit and the Center for Neuroscience. You will split your time between building institute-wide AI tools and applying them directly to neuroscience research challenges.
...
As an LLM Engineer in this shared position, you will:
...
- Develop and deploy LLM-based pilot projects tailored to neuroscience research at the CNL, applying AI to questions in molecular, cellular and circuit neuroscience, neurodegeneration, neurodevelopment and disease mechanisms.
...
- Build and maintain components of VIB's institutional intelligence layer, including agentic bioinformatics workflows, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems, and AI-assisted experimental design tools.
...
- Design, implement, and evaluate LLM-based solutions for scientific text mining, multimodal integration of literature and biological data, and knowledge extraction to support discovery.
...
- Collaborate with wet-lab and computational neuroscience researchers to identify opportunities where generative AI and LLMs can accelerate scientific progress.
...
- Work with the Machine Learning Expertise Unit and VIB's AI Studio to translate pilot projects into practical tools that serve the broader VIB community.
...
- Promote ethical, transparent, and responsible use of LLMs in line with best practices and international standards.
...
- Mine opportunities and data at the center’s advanced technology expertise centers and affiliated central core facilities.
...
- Leverage VIB's Data Core services, including high-performance computing pipelines and large-scale GPU resources, to scale LLM development and deployment.
...
- PhD in machine learning, computer science, computational biology, computational neuroscience, statistics, or a related field.
- Strong experience with large language models, including pretraining, fine-tuning, prompt engineering, and evaluation.
- Knowledge of modern deep learning frameworks (e.g., PyTorch, JAX, TensorFlow).
- Experience with real-world applications of LLMs in scientific or biomedical contexts is a plus.
...
- Familiarity with neuroscience data types (imaging, electrophysiology, genomics, proteomics, or clinical data) is a plus but not required.
...
- Ability to work collaboratively across disciplines and communicate effectively with researchers from different backgrounds.
- A strong interest in applying LLMs to impactful life science and neuroscience problems.
...
- The opportunity to pioneer applications of LLMs in neuroscience and the broader life sciences.
...
- A unique position at the interface of an AI platform team and a world-class neuroscience research center, with exposure to both engineering and scientific challenges.
...
- Direct access to VIB's Data Core services, which provide expert support in data management and high-performance computing, including optimized pipelines and large-scale GPU resources.
...
Please complete the application through the VIB online application tool. A complete application file should contain the following documents:
...
For further information, please send an email to stein.aerts@kuleuven.be or joost.schymkowitz@kuleuven.be with subject title Inquiry: LLM Engineer CNL/VIB.AI.

Employer Sanofi Location Cambridge, Massachusetts Start date Jun 16, 2026

Job Title: Principal Scientist, Neurology Research, Cambridge MA
...
As a Principal Scientist within the Neurology Research Team you will lead machine learning/AI based discovery efforts to advance research programs focused on Alzheimers, Parkinsons, ALS/FTD, and Multiple Sclerosis. You will join a team to lead the analyses of large scale public and internal data sets from human brain tissue single cell and spatial omics (rna, protein and lipids), fluid proteogenomic biomarkers (CSF and plasma), and functional screening (CRISPR) in human disease relevant cell models. You will help uncover causal molecular and cellular mechanisms of disease by employing state-of the art Machine Learning/AI methods on the above data sets to accelerate new target and biomarker discovery efforts.

At Pfizer, our purpose is to deliver breakthroughs that change patients’ lives. Our cross-functional Data Ecosystem Team is hiring a data and AI engineer to help build and scale an AI-ready data architecture supporting biotherapeutics labs. The PositionWhy GenentechWe're passionate about delivering on Our Promise to improve the lives of patients and create healthier communities for all. We foster a culture of inclusivity, integrity and creativity while boldly pursuing answers to the world's most complex health challenges and transforming society.Genentech's Data, Digital, and Analytics (DDA) team is dedicated to solving complex healthcare challenges and improving patient outcomes. DDA empowers business partners across Commercial, Medical, and Government Affairs (CMG) to make impactful decisions by leveraging data, analytics, and AI/ML to enable fast, targeted actions in rapidly evolving business contexts.DDA fosters a unified understanding of customers, actions, and outcomes by transforming the business insight supply chain from the traditional reactive service model to a modern proactive product model, which integrates analytics and insights seamlessly into CMG's evolving digital, data, and automation platforms, creating scalable solutions and eliminating silos. In DDA, you will work as a trusted, objective advisor and expert, recommending critical decisions and actions to be taken with credibility and a focus on driving measurable impact. You will be part of a diverse, inclusive team that reflects the world we serve, thriving in a welcoming culture built on collaboration and innovation.The OpportunityThe Sr. Data Scientist - Generative AI Application Specialist is responsible for building fundamental agentic capabilities and high-level business applications within a fast-moving, experimental environment. This role bridges the gap between technical infrastructure and user experience, collaborating with infrastructure teams to design agents and partnering with product owners to ensure optimal development approaches for desired UX. As a subject matter expert, you will stay at the forefront of Generative AI models and capabilities, influencing technical priorities in a complex enterprise environment while representing the team across the global Roche organization.

highlights:
Machine Learning (ML) Engineer at VIB.AI job with VIB | 12860981
...
# Machine Learning (ML) Engineer at VIB.AI
...
Employer VIB Location Leuven Closing date 21 Aug 2026
...
## Job Details
...
Application deadline: August 31, 2026 About us VIB is a leading life sciences research institute in Flanders, Belgium, with a strong focus on translating basic scientific discoveries into benefits for society. With the launch of VIB.AI, we are expanding our mission to harness the power of artificial intelligence for life sciences research, innovation, and impact. We are now looking for a Machine Learning (ML) Engineer to join the Machine Learning Expertise Unit at VIB.AI. Your role As an ML Engineer, you will: Develop and deploy ML solutions in close collaboration with researchers across VIB centers, applying state-of-the-art methods to cutting-edge biomedical questions.Design, implement, and evaluate ML and foundation-model approaches, including LLM-based solutions, for scientific text mining, multimodal integration of literature and biological data, and knowledge extraction to support discovery.Collaborate with researchers to identify opportunities where generative AI can accelerate scientific progress.Work within the Machine Learning Expertise Unit and with VIB AI Studio to translate pilot projects into practical tools.Promote ethical, transparent, and responsible use of AI in line with best practices and international standards.Leverage VIB Data Core services, including high-performance computing pipelines and large-scale GPU resources, to scale ML development and deployment. Your profile PhD in machine learning, computer science, computational biology, statistics, or a related field.Knowledge of modern deep learning frameworks (e.g., PyTorch, JAX, TensorFlow).Experience developing AI applications for scientific or biomedical research, including LLM-based and agentic AI systems, is a plus.Ability to work collaboratively across disciplines and communicate effectively with researchers from different backgrounds.A strong interest in applying ML to impactful life science problems.We welcome applications from both early-career and experienced ML engineers. Our offer A stimulating, international, interdisciplinary, collaborative, and supportive work environment, which emphasizes diversity and inclusion.An environment that promotes personal development.The opportunity to pioneer applications of ML in biomedical sciences.Direct access to VIB’s Data Core services, which provide expert support in data management and high-performance computing, including optimized pipelines and large-scale GPU resources.A competitive salary and benefits package, with relocation support if needed.The chance to make a lasting impact on science, health, and society. About VIB.AI VIB.AI is the artificial intelligence initiative of VIB, designed to accelerate breakthroughs in life sciences by integrating advanced AI methods into research, discovery, and innovation. For more information, visit vib.ai/en. How to apply Please complete the application through the VIB online application tool (https://jobs.vib.be/apply/135914). A complete application file should contain the following documents: Your motivation letter stating career goals, past experience, and how these relate to the current position.Your CV.Contact information of three references. Application deadline: August 31st 2026. For further information, please send an email to pedro.goncalves@kuleuven.be, dmitry.kobak@ugent.be or stein.aerts@kuleuven.be with subject title Inquiry: ML Engineer.

# Senior Machine Learning Scientist, Agentic AI
...
🇺🇸 United States –
...
🤖 Machine Learning Engineer
...
Natera is a global leader in cell-free DNA testing technology, specializing in non-invasive genetic testing and diagnostics. The company's innovative solutions focus on areas such as prenatal screening, cancer detection, and organ transplant monitoring. By using advanced bioinformatics and DNA analysis, Natera provides healthcare professionals and patients with critical information to make more informed medical decisions.

### 📋 Description
...
• Lead the technical design and deployment of multi-agent systems capable of autonomous hypothesis generation and tool use, including genomic variant calling, LLM fine-tuning, and clinical trial matching pipelines • Incorporate and advance Natera’s transformer-based foundation model by integrating DNA, RNA, and H&E imaging modalities for multi-step biological reasoning and tool use • Implement advanced LLM reasoning frameworks, such as ReAct and Chain-of-Thought, alongside reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT) to ensure agents provide accurate, explainable clinical rationales • Architect systems that autonomously translate complex, multi-modal data into diagnostic and therapeutic insights with human-verifiable reasoning and tracing • Own the technical strategy and product roadmap for agentic workflows across the Biopharma Solutions and Therapeutics Discovery division, converting complex clinical challenges into scalable AI systems • Establish production-grade machine learning engineering standards and reproducible architectures across the AI team to ensure absolute model transparency and scientific auditability • Drive cross-functional alignment and technical consensus by defending agentic architectures and biological reasoning frameworks in rigorous peer reviews
